_comment: Edit this file to customize your radial menu. Save and re-open the menu (the file is re-read every time it opens). Icons can be: an absolute path (/path/to/icon.png), a freedesktop name (firefox, code), or empty for a fallback glyph.
_layout: items 0-3 fill the top arc (NW → NE), items 4-7 fill the bottom arc (SE → SW). Order = position around the ring.
